seo.metaDescription: Christine Mae Tse — Chief of Staff and AI operator at Outset Capital, based in Chicago. Fund operations, event production, deal flow, CRM automation, and AI tooling.
seo.schemaDescription: Chief of Staff and AI operator at Outset Capital, based in Chicago. Leads fund operations, deal flow, LP relations, event production, CRM/workflow automation, and AI tooling.
seo.profileDescription: Canonical profile for Christine Mae Tse, Chief of Staff and AI operator at Outset Capital in Chicago, focused on fund operations, venture operations, event production, deal flow, CRM automation, and AI tooling.

content.projectNote: Still learning — these are tools I built to solve real problems.

projects.name: geoguessr-coach
projects.desc: Chrome extension + local helper that reviews your GeoGuessr games after each match — silently captures what you looked at and uses Claude vision, grounded in GeoGuessr tools by the community, to coach the region-level clues you missed

projects.name: podcast-shorts-pipeline
projects.desc: Open-source pipeline that turns a podcast draft-shorts doc into captioned vertical shorts — auto-cuts segments, transcribes, and renders single-pane or stacked layouts with karaoke captions

projects.name: attio-fathom-sync
projects.desc: Syncs call recordings, transcripts, and notes into CRM, auto-tagging contacts and updating deal stages after every meeting

projects.name: mixmax-extension
projects.desc: Email-sending extension that surfaces at a LinkedIn profile to help draft outreach

projects.name: pipeline-triage
projects.desc: Automatically adds inbound contacts to CRM pipeline and sorts them by stage

projects.name: portfolio-dashboard
projects.desc: AI-powered dashboard tracking fund metrics across portfolio companies

projects.name: monitor
projects.desc: Monitors trending repos and product launches for deal flow signals

projects.name: preposition-trainer
projects.desc: Web app for practicing English preposition usage

writing.title: I built a robot to write like my boss
writing.metaDescription: Notes on /alify — a Claude skill that rewrites my drafts in my boss's voice, built on a hand-written voice profile and an append-only correction log.
writing.ogDescription: Notes on /alify — a Claude skill that rewrites my drafts in my boss's voice.
writing.llmsDescription: Notes on /alify — a Claude skill that rewrites drafts in a boss's voice, built on a hand-written voice profile and an append-only correction log.

writing.title: Building CRM glue that doesn't fall over
writing.metaDescription: Notes from building an event-driven daemon for a small VC fund's CRM ops — workflows, actions, an AI triage layer, and the failure modes that shaped the design.
